generated_oml:
instance LidarSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing point cloud data for the 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring vehicle speed for the 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring steering angle for the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance MotorTorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring motor torque signals"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorTorqueData
]

instance SteeringServoPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring steering servo position signals"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringServoPositionData
]

instance LidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LidarSensor
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via ROS2"
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data transmitted via ROS2"
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
    base:desc "Steering angle data transmitted via ROS2"
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorTorqueSensor
    base:desc "Motor torque signals transmitted via ROS2"
]

instance SteeringServoPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoPositionSensor
    base:desc "Steering servo position signals transmitted via ROS2"
]

instance RawLidarData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from physical sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreprocessingEnabler
]

instance RawVehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreprocessingEnabler
]

instance RawSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreprocessingEnabler
]

instance RawMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw motor torque data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreprocessingEnabler
]

instance RawSteeringServoPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw steering servo position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringServoPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreprocessingEnabler
]

instance DataPreprocessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for preprocessing sensor data, including Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for communication between entities"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time vehicle state visualization, projected driving path, detected object tracks, and data reporting via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization, ProjectedDrivingPath, DetectedObjectTracks, DataReporting
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system computations including lead vehicle detection and speed calculation to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedCalculation
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides remote control capabilities for ACC system including enabling/disabling, setting desired speed, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBraking
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed, position, and other state parameters"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPath : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected path of the vehicle based on current trajectory and obstacles"
]

instance DetectedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected and tracked objects from point cloud data"
]

instance DataReporting : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Aggregated data reports for system monitoring"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle for adaptive cruise control"
]

instance SpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of desired speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disables Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sets target speed for Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataPreprocessingEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler, DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LowerChassisLayer, UpperChassisLayer, AutonomyElements, LidarSensor, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorTorqueSensor, SteeringServoPositionSensor
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization subcomponent of User Interface for real-time data display"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel subcomponent for user inputs and commands"
]

instance LowerChassisLayer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lower level chassis layer of the physical twin vehicle"
]

instance UpperChassisLayer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper level chassis layer of the physical twin vehicle"
]

instance AutonomyElements : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Autonomy elements including sensors and control systems"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Controlling FE are processed by the Data Translation component for serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversion. These commands are transmitted via ROS2 for intra-component communication and Wi-Fi UDP for inter-entity communication to the Actuation FE, which interfaces with physical actuators such as motor and steering servo."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization with 100 ms accuracy is required across all devices for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, constrained by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Function Elements (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. These packages, containing ROS2 nodes, are organized into three entities: User Entity (3D Visualization and Control Panel), Digital Twin Entity (data management and control mechanisms), and Physical Twin Entity (sensor/actuator data processing and automotive functions like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking). Each entity is deployed on dedicated hardware, with the Physical Twin Entity deviating from ISO 23247 by encompassing broader system resources beyond typical OME functionality."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components uses ROS2, while inter-entity communication occurs over a Wi-Fi network using UDP at the transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system complies with ISO 23247, a four-part standard for digital twin framework in manufacturing. Part 2 defines the reference architecture with entities including Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities handle specific tasks such as actuation, data transformation into human-interpretable formats, and user interface interactions, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) specified as a protocol for implementation."
]
